body.title: CLOSED: remove dead webhook branch from DiscordTransport
body.result: deleted dead _send_webhook branch and call site; warnings now consistent
body.description:
Pass-2 area_5 finding: DiscordTransport._send_webhook is dead code — the path is never reached in production and silently fails. Delete the branch, return False with a logged warning if webhook path is needed.

**Affected files:** lab/utility_closet/transports/discord.py
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** IN — delete _send_webhook branch, add log.warning on that path, return False. OUT — implementing webhook properly (separate ticket if needed).
**Test plan:** Existing discord transport tests pass; grep confirms _send_webhook is deleted; dead code scanner finds no reference.
**Pass condition:** `grep -r '_send_webhook' lab/utility_closet/` returns empty.
